# === canonical (hand-written; preserved by generator) ===
#
# Rule: geo_coordinates
# Category: location
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Splits on a single comma and applies `geo_latitude` / `geo_longitude`
# to each half; any other shape fails closed. Example: 37.7749,-122.4194
# → 37.77**,-122.41**.

37.7749,-122.4194	37.77**,-122.41**

# === generated (do not edit; regenerated by make corpus-regen) ===
